source.title: 1st Mastery Armors : Mu Online
source.language: pt route with English guide content

usageNotes: External Webzen assets are stored as original references and should be reviewed before publication.
Item image files are intentionally duplicated by item name when the Webzen guide reuses the same source image for multiple classes.
intro: Lorencia Knights worshipping a sword also started to believe in God who can protect themselves in the battlefield where terror rules. They created weapons and armors signifying craving for angels who can protect them in the battlefield where belief in absolute god leading them to victory and terror about death are the only things left. White signifies God's blessing leading the war to victory, and red signifies angel's blood which will protect them. Mercy only means the road to death in the war. Go ahead with angels toward the road to victory stained with red blood.
acquisition: New equipment item is added for characters who completed 3rd class change over Lv. 400.
Added 3 types of Mastery Equipment (Normal Item, Excellent Item, Set Item).

featureTables.title: Armor Excellent Option
rows: Decreases damage dealt to character by 195.

5% of all damage character receives is reflected
back to enemy.
Increases character's defense success rate by 10%

Increases the amount of Zen
acquired for hunting monsters
by 50%

Increases the amount of Zen character acquires
by 50%

featureTables.title: Stat Option for Mastery Equipment Only
rows: Stat Option for Mastery Equipment Only
Only added to Set Item containing Mastery Equipment. (Stat option for Mastery Equipment Only)

featureTables.title: Set option for Mastery Only
rows: Increases character's all stats. (STR, AGI, STA, ENG, Cmd)

Character has a defense which can't be ignored.
(It can't be increased more than defense character has.)
Increases character's Min. DMG and Max. DMG.
Increases min Magical DMG and max Magical DMG.
